sections.heading:
Stop Overpaying.
Altovia Finds Deals You'd Never Find.
sections.subheading: Cheap flights, first-class steals, and AI-powered savings — all in one tap. Your wallet is about to thank you.

sections.heading: Save More on Every Trip
sections.subheading: Real deals. Real savings. Every single time.

items.title: Prices Other Apps Miss
items.description: Altovia scans hundreds of airlines and booking sites at once — surfacing cheap flights, error fares, and business class deals that other search tools bury or skip entirely.

items.title: Your Points Are Worth More
items.description: Altovia finds the award seat upgrades and first class redemptions hiding in your loyalty accounts. Get the most out of miles you've already earned — effortlessly.

items.title: Book in Seconds, Not Hours
items.description: Stop spending weekends hunting for deals. Altovia surfaces the best options in seconds so you can book while the price is still low — and move on with your life.

items.title: Deals From the US & Canada
items.description: Budget getaways, premium cabin upgrades, or last-minute escapes — Altovia finds them all for travelers flying out of the US and Canada.

items.title: Price Drop Alerts
items.description: Set it and forget it. Altovia watches flights for you and alerts you when prices drop — so you catch the deal without obsessively refreshing tabs.

items.title: No Hidden Fees Surprises
items.description: See the full price before you commit. Altovia shows total costs upfront — no sticker shock at checkout. What you see is what you pay.

sections.heading: Common Questions
sections.subheading: Everything you want to know before downloading.

items.question: How does Altovia find cheaper flights than other apps?
items.answer: Altovia uses AI to scan across major airlines and booking sources simultaneously, including lesser-known fare classes and error fares. It surfaces deals that standard search tools miss — especially for business class and premium cabin upgrades.

items.question: I already use Google Flights. Why switch?
items.answer: Google Flights is a search form. Altovia is an AI that actively finds deals for you, watches prices, alerts you when they drop, and helps you use your points too. It's not just search — it's a savings engine.

items.question: Does it actually find business class deals for economy prices?
items.answer: Yes — this is one of Altovia's standout features. It spots business and first class award seats and discounted premium fares that most travelers never find because they require combining multiple search strategies at once.

items.question: Is Altovia free?
items.answer: Free to download with a 7-day full access trial. No credit card required to start. After the trial, choose a plan based on how often you travel — most users save far more than the subscription cost on their first booking.

items.question: What airports and airlines are supported?
items.answer: Altovia focuses on US and Canadian departure cities and covers most major international and domestic airlines. Premium cabin deals across all major alliances included.
